title: Erich's Lab
headline: A public shelf for ideas that are useful before they are finished.
introduction: Small tools, learning artifacts, data experiments, and prototypes. Each build can stay lightweight, graduate into a larger project, or simply remain an interesting working object.

principles.title: Small is valid
principles.description: A single useful HTML file belongs here just as much as a larger app.

principles.title: Content stays editable
principles.description: Pages CMS edits Markdown and media in GitHub while Astro turns them into the catalog.

principles.title: Promotion is optional
principles.description: A promising build can later move into its own repository without breaking its lab URL.
